coreIssue: This growth conversation is about whether Toby can step from Design Lead execution into visible org-level decision ownership and influence.
openingQuestion: What kind of decisions and cross-functional moments would you like to own more visibly as you grow beyond your current Design Lead scope?
listenFor: whether he names a specific decision or forum where he held back from taking a visible position
whether he points to one stakeholder or function whose backing changes his ability to influence outcomes
whether if they describe next-level scope, they make it concrete with a project, decision type, or cross-functional tradeoff
avoid: do not turn the last promotion cycle into a post-mortem about why he was passed over
do not offer a broad development list instead of narrowing to one leadership-shaped ownership area
goodOutcome: You and Toby have agreed one lead-level growth contract: a specific cross-functional decision area he will own end-to-end, what visible design leadership looks like there, and where your sponsorship applies.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where Toby shipped strong work but did not convert it into broader decision influence, so you can ground the conversation in one concrete pattern.
